about.title: About Sintok's Echoes
about.lead: A safe and anonymous space for UUM students to share their stories, feelings, and experiences. We respect privacy and provide analytics to help student services understand campus sentiment without exposing individuals.
about.mission: To provide an anonymous outlet for students to express concerns and for administrators to spot trends and take action while preserving privacy.
about.contact: This is a demo site. For feedback or issues, contact the project maintainer.
